title: Plutarch, Moralia: How a Man May Become Aware of His Progress in Virtue
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: How a Man May Become Aware of His Progress in Virtue.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: How a Man May Become Aware of His Progress in Virtue.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'How a Man May Become Aware of His Progress in Virtue': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
